desc: deviation chain end-to-end: CtQ <- antecedent -> deviation -> CAPA (missing middle captured)
critical deviation with no CAPA is caught (ICH E6 obligation as a shape)
deviation with no recorded antecedent = governance Warning (the missing middle)
E6(R3) essential records: source document + data + audit trail + certified copy in the TMF
certified copy referencing no source document is caught (E6(R3) certified-copy)
source data with no explicit audit-trail node = ALCOA++ Warning
TMF artifact type with a content binding (document-type + content binding)
TMF artifact type with no content binding = Warning (filing label, not comprehension)
Universal DNA: entity carries identifier + observedAt + status
Universal DNA: entity missing its status strand is caught (negative)
Evidence carrying full bitemporal+PROV envelope
missing recordedAt + attribution is caught (negative)
oncology FIH study end-to-end (design, delegation, enrollment, consent, dosing, DLT)
Enrollment missing the pseudonymous StudySubject bridge is caught
ungated Delegation (missing required Credential) is caught
undelegated capability use is a hard Violation (flagship invariant)
consent before delegation effective = Warning, not fatal (risk-proportionate)
bitemporal fixtures are structurally valid (back-dating is detective, not structural)
owned, provenance-tagged crosswalks pass the curation gate
uncurated mapping (no confidence/justification/provenance) is rejected
Phase 2 -> EOP2: traceable ORR result + agreement + risk register + Optimus-based design
efficacy result untraceable to estimand/SAP is caught (overstatement guard)
EOP2 without a binding agreement = readiness Warning, not fatal
SAEs + safety reports are structurally valid (15-day breach is detective)
Pre-IND gate: briefing book + proposed-position question + addressed nonclinical finding
animal toxicity not addressed by a clinical safety assessment (broken IND narrative)
Pre-IND question without a proposed position = vague-question Warning
IND clock fixtures are structurally valid (30-day clock is detective)
ADaM lineage: result -> ADAE -> native source, traceable to estimand/SAP
orphan ADaM dataset (no declared source) breaks traceability
act attached to a pseudonymous StudySubject (PII contained)
act attached directly to an identifiable Person is caught (PII leak)
CDISC ODM EAV capture: event->CRF->itemgroup->item->observation + query + SDV + PHI tag
clinical observation with no variable definition (orphan EAV value)
query with no anchor / resolution status (orphan discrepancy)
data element with no PHI classification = governance Warning
specimen custody chain + aliquot lineage + assay result (SENAITE/LabKey patterns)
unrooted specimen (no collection event, no parent) breaks chain of custody
custody event with an invalid lifecycle state is caught
assay result not joined to a sample/service is caught
RBQM: high-risk -> intensive SDV, low-risk -> reduced SDV (risk-targeted)
high-risk critical-to-quality factor with no mitigation plan is caught
100% SDV on a low-risk factor = over-monitoring Warning
malformed risk assessment (no factor/level) is caught
site activation backed by IRB approval + executed CTA + completed SIV
premature activation (no SIV) is caught
